name: Sprouting Ramen Salad (Chopstix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a rapid boil and add the noodles. When the noodles are still firm but no longer raw in the center, drain them into a colander.
2. Rinse the drained noodles under cold water and drain thoroughly again.
3. Pull the alfalfa sprouts apart and set them aside.
4. In a small ungreased skillet over high heat, toast the sesame seeds until golden brown for about 4 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. Combine all dressing ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
6. Toss the noodles with the dressing until well coated, then refrigerate to chill thoroughly.
7. Toss the noodles with the sprouts.
8. Turn out the salad onto serving plates, sprinkle with seeds, and serve 3 entrees or 4 to 6 salads.
